mapper.sql: owner_id, subject_type, subject_id, mastered, mastery_level, title_snapshot, keywords_snapshot, first_mastered_at, last_mastered_at, source_deleted_at, version, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT plan_id, owner_id, title, overview, estimated_minutes, generated_at, version, created_at, updated_at FROM learning_plan WHERE owner_id = #{ownerId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
SELECT plan_id, package_id, title_snapshot, keywords_snapshot, package_status_snapshot, position FROM learning_plan_package WHERE plan_id = #{planId} ORDER BY position ASC

SELECT step_id, plan_id, title, description, package_ids_snapshot, estimated_minutes, scheduled_date, actual_minutes, stage_label, reflection, status, position, completed_at FROM learning_plan_step WHERE plan_id = #{planId} ORDER BY position ASC

SELECT proposal.proposal_id, proposal.plan_id, proposal.summary, proposal.steps_snapshot, proposal.input_snapshot, proposal.output_snapshot, proposal.created_at FROM learning_plan_replan_proposal proposal JOIN learning_plan plan ON plan.plan_id = proposal.plan_id WHERE plan.owner_id = #{ownerId} AND plan.status = 'ACTIVE' AND proposal.proposal_id = #{proposalId}
